findings.description: The code example in the tip showing how to extend AnnotationComponentDefinitionLoader (ExampleComponentDefinitionLoader class with getBasePackage() and newComponentCreator() overrides) is omitted. The knowledge file only captures the concept ('newComponentCreator をオーバーライドすることで任意の ComponentCreator 実装に差し替え可能') without showing the concrete implementation pattern.
findings.source_evidence: public class ExampleComponentDefinitionLoader extends AnnotationComponentDefinitionLoader { @Override protected String getBasePackage() { return "com.example"; } @Override protected ComponentCreator newComponentCreator() { return new ExampleComponentCreator(); } }

findings.description: The knowledge file adds a closing brace `}` to the ExampleService class in the @ConfigValue code example. The source file does not include this closing brace — the class definition is left open (truncated).
findings.source_evidence: Source ends the @ConfigValue example at: public ExampleService(@ConfigValue("${example.service.errorMessageId}") String errorMessageId) { this.errorMessageId = errorMessageId; } — with no closing `}` for the class body

findings.description: The knowledge file states '先に廃棄したいオブジェクトをリストの**下に設定**する（初期化の設定とは逆）'. The parenthetical '（初期化の設定とは逆）' is an inference not present in the source. The source only states the disposal ordering rule independently without explicitly contrasting it with initialization order.
findings.source_evidence: Source states: '廃棄対象のオブジェクトの廃棄順を意識する必要がある場合は、先に廃棄したいオブジェクトをより **下に設定する** 。' — no mention of '初期化の設定とは逆'
